whatsapp.defaultMessage: Hello Justine, I would like to know more about your creations.

about.heroSubtitle: A passion transformed into an art of living
about.heroTagline: Founded in Yaoundé, shining to the world
about.storyPara1: Born from a deep passion for fashion and African textile heritage, Justine Kem's is a couture house founded in Yaoundé, Cameroon, with the ambition of celebrating every woman through unique and refined creations.
about.storyPara2: Guided by an exceptional attention to detail, our atelier blends international haute couture techniques with the richness of African textiles — wax, kente, bazin riche — to create pieces that transcend cultures and generations.
about.storyPara3: Today, Justine Kem's dresses women on four continents, from Douala to Paris, from Dakar to Toronto, with the same demand for artisanal perfection.
about.value1Desc: Every piece is handcrafted with meticulous precision, respecting the traditions of haute couture.
about.value2Desc: We celebrate the richness of African textiles and craftsmanship by elevating them to contemporary luxury.
about.value3Desc: No two clients are alike. Every creation is tailored to your morphology, tastes and story.
about.value4Desc: From Africa to the world, we deliver Cameroonian elegance to over 10 countries.
about.teamDesc: A team of passionate professionals at the service of your elegance
about.ctaDesc: Book a consultation with our team and let us create your unique piece.

services.heroSubtitle: Bespoke haute couture, prestige rental, training — excellence at every step.

hauteCouture.title: Bespoke Haute Couture
hauteCouture.description: From measurements to delivery, experience a creation entirely designed for you. Each piece is unique, adjusted to your morphology and designed according to your desires.
hauteCouture.f1Desc: Discussion about your needs, style, and occasion
hauteCouture.f2Desc: Selection from our premium collections (wax, silk, crepe)
hauteCouture.f3Desc: 15 measurement points for a perfect fit

soiree.title: Evening Collection
soiree.description: Elegant and refined dresses for your high-end events, cocktails, and galas.

mariage.title: Wedding Collection
mariage.description: Sublime bridal gowns, handcrafted for the most beautiful day of your life.

couple.title: Couple Outfits
couple.description: Harmonious and matching creations to shine together at your major events.

s1.title: Consultation
s1.desc: Discussion of your wishes, fabric fitting

location.title: Prestige Outfit Rental
location.description: For your special events, access our exclusive wardrobe. Evening dresses, bespoke suits, ceremonial outfits ready to sublimate your moment.

formations.heroSubtitle: Learn the art of sewing from the experts
formations.introDesc: Our trainings are designed to transmit not only techniques but also the philosophy of couture excellence. Learn from passionate professionals in a caring and stimulating environment.
formations.formation1Desc: Discover the fundamentals of sewing: fabric correction, basic pattern, seams and finishes. Ideal for beginners wishing to learn with solid foundations.
formations.formation2Desc: Perfect your techniques with more elaborate projects: structured dresses, fitted garments, working with African fabrics (wax, kente, bazin).
formations.formation3Desc: Master haute couture techniques: draping, custom pattern making, embroidery, luxury finishes. Complete training to create a collection.
formations.formation4Desc: Learn professional styling codes: morphological analysis, color harmony, wardrobe construction, client consulting.
formations.adv1Desc: All our trainers have over 10 years of professional experience in luxury couture.
formations.adv2Desc: Maximum 8 students per group for personalized follow-up and rapid progress.
formations.adv3Desc: Fabrics, threads, sewing tools provided during training. You leave with your creations.
formations.adv4Desc: At the end of each training, receive a skills certificate that can be used professionally.
formations.enrollDesc: Select your training and contact us to start your learning journey.
formations.ctaTitle: Your passion for sewing starts here
formations.ctaDesc: Join our students and master the art of creating unique pieces with Justine Kem's expertise.

form.title: Send Us a Message
form.messagePlaceholder: Describe your project or ask your question (min 20 characters)...
form.uploadDrop: Drag an image here or click to explore
form.consent: I agree to be contacted via WhatsApp to follow up on this request.*

newsletter.title: Stay in Justine Kem's Universe
newsletter.subtitle: Receive advanced previews of our new collections, fashion tips, and exclusive offers — no spam, promised ✦
newsletter.successMessage: You will soon receive our exclusives in your mailbox.
newsletter.errorGeneral: An error occurred. Please try again.
newsletter.errorEmail: Please enter a valid email address.

footer.descShort: Haute couture house in Yaoundé — Essos district. Wedding dresses, traditional outfits, evening wear and bespoke creations since 2015.

metadata.title: Justine Kem's - Bespoke Haute Couture in Yaoundé
metadata.description: Haute couture house in Yaoundé, Cameroon. Bespoke creations, luxury garment rentals and professional sewing training.

savoirFaire.title: Our expertise
savoirFaire.hcDesc: Unique creations designed to enhance your silhouette
savoirFaire.locDesc: Exceptional outfits available for your events
savoirFaire.formDesc: Transmitting our passion to the new generation

process.title: How it works?
process.s1Desc: Describe your project via WhatsApp or our form.
process.s2Desc: Measurement taking and fabric selection together.
process.s3Desc: Our atelier crafts your piece with care, bespoke and premium quality.
process.s4Desc: Impeccable reception, anywhere in the world.

fallback.t1Content: Justine created the dress of my dreams for my wedding. The attention to detail is simply incredible.
fallback.t2Content: Exemplary professionalism. The finishes are worthy of the greatest European fashion houses.
fallback.t3Content: Even from a distance, the communication and measurements were perfect. My dress arrived impeccably packaged.

cta.title: Your unique piece awaits
cta.desc: Contact us today and let's start creating the outfit of your dreams together.
